build.buildCommand: pip install -r requirements.txt && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput

deploy.startCommand: python manage.py migrate && python manage.py shell -c "from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model; U=get_user_model(); U.objects.filter(username='admin').exists() or U.objects.create_superuser('admin','admin@admin.com','qazwsx')" && gunicorn teach_me_music.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:$PORT --workers 2 --timeout 120
